text.title: Swift Architecture as Tests via Harmonize + Swift Testing Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: ARCHITECTURE.md says 'no imports from UI into Core'; violated routinely.
antipattern.fix: Convert to Harmonize test; fail build on violation.

antipattern.symptom: SwiftLint covers style; layering still erodes.
antipattern.fix: Add Harmonize for structural rules; keep SwiftLint for style.

antipattern.symptom: Arch test fails; nobody knows why the rule exists; rule deleted.
antipattern.fix: Mandate doc comment with ADR link on every arch test.
